ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot forming the number 8 with its arms.  The movement will be smooth and deliberate, emphasizing the circular nature of the number. The robot's arms will move from a neutral position to form two circles, one above the other, representing the top and bottom loops of the number 8. The wrists will maintain a neutral position throughout the animation. Let's create a sequence of 5 frames.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to begin
arms sweep out and up, forming the top loop
arms curve down, starting the bottom loop
arms sweep back up, completing the bottom loop
arms return to rest, the eight is formed
